result:
The session is running in a restrictive permission mode — `git checkout`, `git push`, and `gh pr create` are all gated. I have everything I need to proceed the moment you approve. Here is what I'll run in order:

1. `git checkout -b claude/daily-report-2026-06-29`
2. Write `reports/2026-06-29-daily.md` (the summary file)
3. `git add reports/2026-06-29-daily.md`
4. `git commit -m "chore: daily repo summary 2026-06-29"`
5. `git push -u origin claude/daily-report-2026-06-29`
6. `gh pr create --draft --title "Daily report: 2026-06-29" --body "..."`

**Summary of what changed in the last 24h** (ready to go into the PR body):

---

> **Repo:** `otchealth-claude-tools`  
> **Window:** last 24 h (2026-06-28 → 2026-06-29)  
> **Commits:** 1 — `cc6436f` *"Folio R2: Edition B cover — matched dark set, raw binary"* (Jun 29 00:45 PT)
>
> This was the **initial push** of the entire repo — 711 files, 80,193 lines added. Key areas landed:
>
> - **`.claude/settings.json` + GitHub Actions workflows** — 8 workflows wired (autonomous-run, avatar pipeline, overnight-agent, test).
> - **`CRO-HyperAgent/gumroad/`** — full book production asset tree: two edition covers (Edition A + B, raw binary PNGs), interior layout SVGs/PNGs, chapter manuscripts (ch01–ch07 for Edition A), diagrams (modality wheel, patient-journey v1–v3, objection iceberg, three-patients), HTML drafts (Kim-spine, Mark-spine, master-outline), and all spec/runbook docs.
> - **`skills/`** — 40+ skills landed: `designer`, `kb-memory`, `vault-sync`, `xero`, `telemetry-wiring`, `token-keeper`, `sunset-protocol`, `systematic-debugging`, `test-author`, `test-driven-development`, `threat-mitigation-mapping`, `wcag-audit-patterns`, and others.
> - **`dream-team/`** — agent roster, plugin launch plan, fleet toolkit reference, memory SOP.
> - **`setup/`** — session-start, octools-sync, repo-freshen, add-repo, bulletin scripts.
> - **`tests/`** — 17 test files covering agent-id, autonomy-runner, brain-rooms, browser-gates, entity, fgl, fleet-dispatch, fleet-medic, frontmatter, index-one, kb-inject, kb-pack, memory-loop, octools-sync, semantic-docid, sunset-protocol.
> - **`CLAUDE.md`** — 212-line standing operating document.
>
> No deletions or regressions. This is a net-new foundation commit.

---

Please approve (or toggle auto-approve for git/gh) and I'll execute all six steps immediately.
